mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY growth in real GDP signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of 5% YoY GDP growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of 10% YoY IP decline are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% MoM increase in initial unemployment claims signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of 0.5% MoM UI claims increase are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-bp decline in the federal funds rate within a 3-month window signals a monetary easing cycle that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of 50-bp FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY growth in real disposable personal income signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods of 10% YoY RDPI growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY decline in housing starts signals a weakening supply environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of 5% YoY housing starts decline are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.2% MoM increase in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of 0.2% MoM unemployment rate increase are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 25-bp decline in the federal funds rate within a 2-month window and a 5% YoY growth in real GDP within the same window signal a monetary easing cycle that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below 1.5% and GDPC1 grows by 5% YoY within 2 months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of 25-bp FEDFUNDS decline and 5% YoY GDP growth are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
